name: Booke AI
tagline: AI bookkeeper that works inside QuickBooks and Xero automatically
description: Booke AI is an AI-powered bookkeeping assistant that works directly inside QuickBooks and Xero. Unlike other tools that just suggest actions, Booke AI actually clicks, categorizes, matches documents, and reconciles automatically within your existing accounting software. It handles transaction categorization, document matching, and reconciliation autonomously.
cons: May need manual review for unusual transactions
